ABOUT US

Transform Your Body,
Transform Your Life

At Advantage Fitness, we are dedicated to helping individuals achieve their fitness goals through expert coaching, personalized workout plans, and a motivating training environment.

Whether you're aiming to lose weight, build muscle, improve endurance, or maintain a healthier lifestyle, our certified trainers provide the guidance and support you need to succeed.

Got Questions?
Frequently
Asked

Everything you need to know before you start your transformation journey.

How do I get started?

Click "Get In Touch" or visit us in person. We'll schedule a free 30-minute consultation to assess your goals and create a personalized training plan with no obligation.

Do you offer a free trial session?

Yes! All new members get a complimentary first session. Experience our coaching style, tour the facility, and train before making any commitment.

What equipment is available?

Our facility is fully equipped with free weights, cable machines, cardio equipment, functional training rigs, battle ropes, and a dedicated recovery zone.

Can I cancel my membership anytime?

All monthly memberships are flexible with just 30 days notice. No hidden fees, no long-term lock-ins unless you choose our discounted annual plan.

Is nutrition coaching included?

Detailed nutrition coaching is included in Elite and Pro packages. Starter members can add it as an optional add-on for just $20/month.

Do you offer online coaching?

Yes, our Pro package includes full online coaching with video sessions, app-based progress tracking, and 24/7 trainer messaging support from anywhere.
